entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.
entries.value: आफैं सिकिरहेका मानिसहरूका लागि निःशुल्क AI सिकाइ साथी।

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.
entries.value: बुझ्न चाहने, नक्कल गर्न होइन, विद्यार्थीहरूका लागि निःशुल्क AI ट्युटर।

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: राम्रो family AI workflow ले सिक्ने व्यक्तिलाई अझ स्वतन्त्र बनाउनुपर्छ, अझ निर्भर होइन। बच्चाले सुरु गर्नु अघि अभिभावकले public page बाट प्रत्येक mode को उद्देश्य हेर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.
entries.value: गृहकार्य सङ्केत, व्याख्या, अध्ययन routine, flashcard र अझ सुरक्षित सिकाइ संवादका लागि inspir का सार्वजनिक AI learning modes बारे अभिभावक-अनुकूल guide।

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: विद्यार्थी, अभिभावक, शिक्षक र self-taught learner ले प्रायः उही AI tutor लाई फरक भाषामा खोज्छन्। अलग page ले सही use case र safety boundary स्पष्ट बनाउँछ।

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: hint माग्नुहोस्, learner लाई next step explain गर्न लगाउनुहोस्, त्यसपछि idea टिक्यो कि टिकेन जाँच्न quiz वा flashcard प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: finished answer माग्नु अघि hints, checks, र feedback माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: prerequisites, simple model, examples, र common misconception माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: final draft तपाईंको आफ्नै राख्दै structure, evidence, र clarity feedback माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: prerequisite ideas, plain-language model, एउटा example, एउटा practice task, र understanding test गर्ने एउटा तरिका माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: हरेक hint पछि के बदलियो भनेर learner लाई explain गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.

entries.value: inspir Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, र study planning जस्ता focused modes मा organized छ।

entries.source: Keep the session focused on learning evidence, not passive answer collection.

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Parents प्रायः takeover नगरी help गर्न खोजिरहेका हुन्छन्। inspir ले families लाई learning behavior visible बनाउने public modes दिन्छ: hints, questions, explain-back, review, र study planning।

entries.source: Paste the question, what you tried, and the stuck point. Ask for the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: question, तपाईंले के प्रयास गर्नुभयो, र stuck point paste गर्नुहोस्। final answer होइन, सबैभन्दा सानो useful hint माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: अभ्यास

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Public pages ले product behavior देखाउँछन्, private student work होइन।

entries.value: guide पढ्नुहोस्

entries.value: पहिलो mode try गर्न तयार हुनुहुन्छ?

entries.value: thread नगुमाई research गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: self-taught learner
entries.value: स्वअध्ययनरत learner

entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.
entries.value: Self-taught learners लाई momentum र structure चाहिन्छ। inspir ले curiosity लाई path मा बदल्न मद्दत गर्छ: explain, build, test, review, र keep going।

entries.source: Start a topic from first principles
entries.value: topic first principles बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: सिक्न सुरु गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: simple explanation बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि तपाईंले फिर्ता explain गर्न नसक्दासम्म Socratic questions सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: simple explanation चाहिँदा Learn Anything, stuck assignment का लागि Homework Coach, वा goal review हो भने Flashcard Builder बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: public guidance बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि right mode खोल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: moment सँग match हुने mode बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: public modes बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि deployment steps, use cases, र trust boundaries review गर्न schools page प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, र self-study सबैलाई फरक framing चाहिन्छ।

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Students लाई fast help चाहिन्छ, तर help ले thinking उनीहरूकै हातमा छोड्नुपर्छ। inspir ले common study moments लाई एउटै generic answer box को सट्टा focused public modes मा route गर्छ।

entries.source: Students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners search for different things. These pages route each audience to the right public mode, guide, and study workflow.
entries.value: Students, parents, teachers, र self-taught learners फरक कुरा search गर्छन्। यी pages ले प्रत्येक audience लाई right public mode, guide, र study workflow मा route गर्छन्।

entries.source: Support writing while preserving voice
entries.value: voice preserve गर्दै writing support गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: Teachers लाई generic chatbot भन्दा धेरै चाहिन्छ। उनीहरूलाई predictable learning behaviors चाहिन्छ: questions सोध्ने, reasoning check गर्ने, practice generate गर्ने, student voice preserve गर्ने, र misconceptions visible बनाउने।

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: audience pages ले expected learning behavior explicit बनाउँछन् ताकि first session better judgment बाट सुरु होस्।

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: यस hub ले answer गर्न built audience searches।

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: pages ले private conversations expose गर्दैनन्। तिनीहरूले public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, र safety boundaries organize गर्छन् ताकि learner सही ठाउँमा सुरु गर्न सकोस्।

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: उही AI tutor homework hint, parent-supervised explain-back loop, teacher evaluation surface, वा self-study coach हुन सक्छ। page ले त्यो clear बनाउनु पर्छ।

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: यो page answer गर्न designed searches।

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: self-study challenge information भेट्नु मात्र होइन। यो next right action choose गर्नु र idea साँच्चै stuck भयो कि भएन थाहा पाउनु हो।

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: strongest SEO pages ले learner लाई strand गर्दैनन्। तिनीहरूले audience intent लाई paths, workflows, guides, र repeatable review सँग connect गर्छन्।

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: strongest student workflow answer-copying होइन। यो loop हो: stuck point explain गर्नुहोस्, एउटा better question सोध्नुहोस्, hint पाउनुहोस्, फेरि try गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि miss review गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: These are live guest entrypoints. They are public and indexable, while private user conversations stay outside sitemap and AI discovery files.
entries.value: यी live guest entrypoints हुन्। तिनीहरू public र indexable छन्, जबकि private user conversations sitemap र AI discovery files बाहिर रहन्छन्।

entries.source: These phrases are visible to learners and included in structured discovery so AI answer engines can understand the audience-specific purpose of the page.
entries.value: यी phrases learners का लागि visible छन् र structured discovery मा included छन् ताकि AI answer engines page को audience-specific purpose बुझ्न सकून्।

entries.source: Turn confusion into a quiz or flashcard before moving on.
entries.value: अगाडि बढ्नुअघि अलमललाई quiz वा flashcard मा बदल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Turn mistakes into review
entries.value: गल्तीहरूलाई review मा बदल्नुहोस्

entries.source: Turn the first click into a complete learning loop.
entries.value: पहिलो click लाई पूरा learning loop मा बदल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: ट्युटरिङ

entries.source: Understand a topic before the test
entries.value: test अघि विषय बुझ्नुहोस्

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, वा planning का लागि tuned mode प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: AI लाई hints, explanations, mistake checks, र review loops का लागि प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। आफूले explain गर्न नसक्ने final answer बनाउन नलगाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: अस्पष्ट goal लाई सानो, test गर्न मिल्ने next step मा बदल्न Code Tutor वा Project Coach प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use hint-first and explain-back workflows for homework support.
entries.value: homework support का लागि hint-first र explain-back workflows प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.
entries.value: hint माग्न Homework Coach प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि learner लाई next move explain गर्न लगाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.
entries.value: students का लागि inspir लाई free AI tutor का रूपमा प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, र exam prep।

entries.source: Use inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, and habit support.
entries.value: explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, र habit support सहित स्वतन्त्र रूपमा जे पनि सिक्न inspir प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to get a simpler model, prerequisite ideas, and examples at the right level.
entries.value: सही level मा सरल model, prerequisite ideas, र examples पाउन Learn Anything प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.
entries.value: session सुरु हुनुअघि behavior छान्न public mode descriptions प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.
entries.value: active recall का लागि quiz र flashcard modes प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि missed items लाई review मा route गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.
entries.value: missed questions लाई visible र repeatable बनाउन quizzes र flashcards प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use quizzes, flashcards, and Socratic questions so the learner shows what they understand.
entries.value: learner ले आफूले के बुझ्यो देखाओस् भनेर quizzes, flashcards, र Socratic questions प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Research Assistant, Source Critic, and Concept Map Builder to organize claims and evidence.
entries.value: claims र evidence organize गर्न Research Assistant, Source Critic, र Concept Map Builder प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use source critique for claims you might cite or act on.
entries.value: cite गर्न वा action लिन सकिने claims का लागि source critique प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.
entries.value: छुटेका दिनपछि restart हुन सक्ने routine बनाउन Study Plan Builder र Habit Coach प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.
entries.value: small sessions र restarts देखिने बनाउन Study Plan Builder वा Habit Coach प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quizzes, flashcards, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.
entries.value: सानो goal छान्न Study Plan Builder प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि progress प्रमाणित गर्न quizzes, flashcards, project steps, वा concept maps प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.
entries.value: custom workflows, confidentiality needs, र rollout steps explore गर्न school page प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Writing Coach for feedback on structure, clarity, evidence, and revision priorities.
entries.value: structure, clarity, evidence, र revision priorities मा feedback का लागि Writing Coach प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Useful AI learning has a clear contract.
entries.value: उपयोगी AI learning सँग स्पष्ट contract हुन्छ।

entries.source: Want the broadest place to start?
entries.value: सुरु गर्न सबैभन्दा फराकिलो ठाउँ चाहनुहुन्छ?

entries.source: What is the best parent-supervised workflow?
entries.value: parent-supervised workflow का लागि सबैभन्दा राम्रो के हो?

entries.source: What should a self-taught learner ask first?
entries.value: self-taught learner ले पहिले के सोध्नुपर्छ?

entries.source: What should a student try first?
entries.value: student ले पहिले के प्रयास गर्नुपर्छ?

entries.source: Where should a school team go next?
entries.value: school team अब कहाँ जानुपर्छ?

entries.source: Who is inspir for?
entries.value: inspir कसका लागि हो?

entries.source: Why separate pages for different audiences?
entries.value: फरक audiences का लागि छुट्टै pages किन?

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: हो। Audience pages ले public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, र AI-readable discovery files मात्र link गर्छन्। Private saved chats excluded नै रहन्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: हो। Public guest modes ले teachers लाई custom deployment discuss गर्नुअघि learning behavior test गर्न दिन्छ।

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: हो। Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, र writing feedback जस्ता public guest modes सिधै खुल्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: हो। Public modes school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, र personal study routines का लागि काम गर्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: हो। public guest modes र audience pages अभिभावकहरूले यसमा भर पर्नुअघि learning behavior inspect गर्न सकून् भनेर design गरिएका छन्।
